calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-21-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, dept. 611, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-brenda fields: c/c for court trial, Mr. David Mendez is present for plaintiff, no appearance by defendant, case proceeds as a prove-up. Mr. Mendez calls first witness for plaintiff and begins direct examination:
DONALD WIE S/E
EXH1 3 day notice ID/EV
No cross-examination being no defendant, and witness is thanked and excused. Plaintiff asks that the defaulted defendant Susan Ann Hackley be included in the judgment, plaintiff then submits prayer. The Court rules for the plaintiff:
$2325.00 rents and damages; and $440.00 rent due at the time of the 3 day notice
Restitution and possession of 240 O'farrell st., #511, SF,CA 94102
Forfeiture of agreement
Plaintiff is to prepare the judgment. Evidence is withdrawn and returned to Mr. Mendez

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Continued To Oct-21-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause was assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Helen A. Sorep-Matley. David G. Mendez, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and there being no appearance by the defendant, the Court ordered the matter off the settlement conference calendar. The request for a jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
